name: biohazard-crime-scene-cleanup-kit
description: Complete compliance-ready marketing system for licensed biohazard and crime scene cleanup companies — 7 compliance moats: OSHA BBP Exposure Control Plan gate (29 CFR 1910.1030), Nevada NDEP medical waste transporter registration gate (NAC 444.916), NRS 451 coroner release/human remains gate, NRS 441A.640 meth lab DPBH certification gate, ABRA/credentialing accuracy gate, Nevada Crime Victim Compensation gate (NRS 217.280/NRS 685A.170), active investigation scene entry gate.
author: max_0x1
